name: IP Ownership Dispute
description: A dispute has arisen over intellectual property created during the contract relationship. Simulate the contractual position on ownership, licensing, and resolution.

parameters.name: disputed_asset
parameters.description: Description of the disputed IP asset
parameters.default_value: Custom software module developed during engagement

analysis_guidance: Focus on: (1) IP ownership clauses — who owns work product? Is there a work-for-hire provision? (2) Pre-existing IP — how is each party's pre-existing IP protected? (3) License grants — what licenses are granted, to whom, and with what scope? Are they perpetual, irrevocable? (4) IP assignment — is there an assignment clause? What does it cover? (5) IP indemnification — who indemnifies whom for IP infringement claims? (6) Confidential information — how does the confidentiality clause interact with IP? (7) Third-party IP — how is third-party or open-source IP handled? (8) Dispute resolution — what mechanism applies to IP disputes specifically? (9) Survival — do IP provisions survive termination?
